# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

_format_version: "3.0"
consumers:
  - username: "user1"
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: "api-key-123"
  - username: "user2"
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: "api-key-456"

upstreams:
  - name: "user-service"
    hosts:
      - host: "user-service.internal"
        port: 8080
        weight: 100
    algorithm: "round-robin"
    retries: 3
    timeout: 30
    healthchecks:
      active:
        http_path: "/health"
        timeout: 5
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 30
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 10
          http_failures: 3
  - name: "order-service"
    hosts:
      - host: "order-service.internal"
        port: 8080
        weight: 100
    algorithm: "round-robin"
    retries: 3
    timeout: 30
    healthchecks:
      active:
        http_path: "/health"
        timeout: 5
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 30
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 10
          http_failures: 3
  - name: "payment-service"
    hosts:
      - host: "payment-service.internal"
        port: 8080
        weight: 100
    algorithm: "round-robin"
    retries: 3
    timeout: 30
    healthchecks:
      active:
        http_path: "/health"
        timeout: 5
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 30
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 10
          http_failures: 3

routes:
  - name: "user-service-route"
    hosts:
      - "api.example.com"
    paths:
      - "/users"
    methods:
      - "GET"
      - "POST"
      - "PUT"
      - "DELETE"
    protocols:
      - "http"
      - "https"
    strip_path: true
    upstreams:
      - name: "user-service"
        weight: 100
    plugins:
      - name: "key-auth"
      - name: "rate-limiting"
        config:
          minute: 1000
          limit_by: "consumer"
          policy: "local"
      - name: "jwt"
        config:
          claim_name: "user_id"
          secret_is_base64: false
      - name: "cors"
        config:
          origins:
            - "*"
          methods:
            - "GET"
            - "POST"
            - "PUT"
            - "DELETE"
            - "OPTIONS"
          headers:
            - "Content-Type"
            - "Authorization"
          max_age: 3600
  - name: "order-service-route"
    hosts:
      - "api.example.com"
    paths:
      - "/orders"
    methods:
      - "GET"
      - "POST"
      - "PUT"
      - "DELETE"
    protocols:
      - "http"
      - "https"
    strip_path: true
    upstreams:
      - name: "order-service"
        weight: 100
    plugins:
      - name: "key-auth"
      - name: "rate-limiting"
        config:
          minute: 500
          limit_by: "consumer"
          policy: "local"
      - name: "jwt"
        config:
          claim_name: "user_id"
          secret_is_base64: false
      - name: "cors"
        config:
          origins:
            - "*"
          methods:
            - "GET"
            - "POST"
            - "PUT"
            - "DELETE"
            - "OPTIONS"
          headers:
            - "Content-Type"
            - "Authorization"
          max_age: 3600
  - name: "payment-service-route"
    hosts:
      - "api.example.com"
    paths:
      - "/payments"
    methods:
      - "GET"
      - "POST"
      - "PUT"
      - "DELETE"
    protocols:
      - "http"
      - "https"
    strip_path: true
    upstreams:
      - name: "payment-service"
        weight: 100
    plugins:
      - name: "key-auth"
      - name: "rate-limiting"
        config:
          minute: 200
          limit_by: "consumer"
          policy: "local"
      - name: "jwt"
        config:
          claim_name: "user_id"
          secret_is_base64: false
      - name: "cors"
        config:
          origins:
            - "*"
          methods:
            - "GET"
            - "POST"
            - "PUT"
            - "DELETE"
            - "OPTIONS"
          headers:
            - "Content-Type"
            - "Authorization"
          max_age: 3600
